office_does: The Pierce County Council adopts county ordinances, budgets, and land-use policy and oversees county services.
race_blurb: Appointed incumbent Bryan Yambe, an eleven-year former Fife councilmember, faces business owner and Puyallup Tribal member Bettina Gese. Their clearest contrast is public investment versus tax and spending scrutiny.

candidates.summary: The appointed incumbent and former Fife councilmember emphasizes public investment in housing, behavioral health, infrastructure, food security, safety, and regional transit.
highlights: Supports affordable housing, behavioral-health and crisis-response funding, transportation safety, and food security [S1][S3]
Opposes delaying or reducing South Sound Sound Transit projects [S2]
Helped adopt the county budget and cites first-year housing, health, infrastructure, and community funding [S3]

spending.basis: His platform and first-year record center on expanded public investment across housing, health, infrastructure, and community services.

housing.basis: Supports county funding for affordable housing, indicating a public-investment approach without a detailed tenant-policy platform.

experience.basis: Combines current county incumbency with eleven years on the Fife City Council and a documented budget record.

candidates.summary: A Puyallup Tribal member and family-business operator emphasizing small-business conditions, public safety, infrastructure, accountability, and scrutiny of taxes and spending.
highlights: Emphasizes small-business conditions, accountability, public safety, and infrastructure [S1][S2]
Calls for scrutiny of taxes and county spending [S1][S2]
Brings tribal, commercial-diving, real-estate, and family-business experience [S1]

taxes.basis: Calls for scrutiny of taxes and county spending, indicating tax restraint without a specific cut proposal.

spending.basis: Emphasizes fiscal restraint and accountability in county spending.

experience.basis: Runs as a private-sector and tribal-community outsider with no documented elected-office record.
